title: NormalizedIrDocument
description: A strict version 1.1 normalized fact document.

coverage_records.description: Coverage records by scope and fact domain.

extensions.description: Namespaced critical and noncritical extension envelopes.

generation.description: Single immutable generation owning every record and reference.

repository.description: Single repository owning every record and reference.

AnalysisTier.description: Declared language-analysis tier for one producer or result.

BuildContextIdentity.description: Stable digest identifying one build-context interpretation.

CoverageRecord.description: One bounded coverage result for a fact domain.

discovered.description: Discovered units in the scope and domain.

evidence.description: Source or derivation evidence for the coverage fact.

tier.description: Analysis tier supporting the coverage result.

CoverageScope.description: A typed scope for one coverage record.

CoverageStatus.description: Completeness of a bounded fact or result set.

oneOf.description: The declared domain was completely analyzed.
A documented bound truncated the domain.

coverage_effect.description: Coverage status after applying the diagnostic.

evidence.description: Source or derivation evidence for the diagnostic fact.

source.description: Optional source region affected by the diagnostic.

oneOf.description: Exported from its module or package.
Synthesized without a direct source declaration.

EntityKind.description: A closed common entity kind understood by the Rootlight core.

oneOf.description: A symbol outside the indexed repository.

EntityRecord.description: One common semantic entity owned by the document repository and generation.

canonical_name.description: Canonical name used by language identity rules.

evidence.description: Source or derivation evidence for the entity fact.

oneOf.description: Visible outside its owning package or module.
Visible to a restricted set of consumers.
Visible only within its owning scope.
Visibility is not expressible in the common projection.

EvidenceKind.description: Evidence class supporting a normalized fact.

oneOf.description: Bounded deterministic derivation from base facts.

ExtensionCriticality.description: Extension criticality understood by compatibility policy.

oneOf.description: A decoder must understand the extension before accepting the document.
A decoder may preserve or skip the extension without changing common facts.

evidence.description: Source or derivation evidence for the extension fact.

payload.description: Opaque canonical UTF-8 payload owned by the extension namespace.

FactDomain.description: A normalized fact domain used for coverage reporting.

FactEvidence.description: Source or derivation evidence required for a normalized fact.

derivation.description: Base facts supporting a derived fact.

source.description: Direct immutable source evidence, when present.

FactRef.description: A typed reference to a base fact used by a derivation.

FilePathLocator.description:
A lossless, component-preserving locator for one repository-relative file.

`FileRecord::path` remains untrusted presentation text. Capability-bearing
readers must instead decode this locator and verify the resulting file ID.

FilePathLocatorEncoding.description: Platform representation used by a lossless file-path locator.

oneOf.description: Lowercase hexadecimal little-endian Windows UTF-16 code units.

FileRecord.description: One immutable file owned by the document repository and generation.

content_hash.description: Immutable content hash used by every source reference.

evidence.description: Source or derivation evidence for the file fact.

path_locator.description: Lossless capability locator, absent only in older compatible documents.

LineRange.description: A validated one-based inclusive source line range.

OccurrenceRecord.description: One source occurrence owned by the document repository and generation.

evidence.description: Source or derivation evidence for the occurrence fact.

OccurrenceRole.description: A closed role for a source occurrence.

OccurrenceTarget.description: A resolved, bounded-candidate, or unresolved occurrence target.

oneOf.description: A bounded set of possible semantic targets.

total_count.description: Candidate count before any declared truncation.

oneOf.description: An unresolved site retained without inventing a target.

text_hash.description: Hash of the source spelling or other untrusted target text.

ProducerIdentity.description: Stable identity of the component that produced facts.

ProducerKind.description: A producer class retained in deduplicated provenance.

ProvenanceRecord.description: One deduplicated producer and derivation provenance record.

binary_digest.description: Digest of the producing binary or immutable package.

build_context.description: Build-context interpretation used by the producer.

derivation_parents.description: Base facts or provenance records used by a derivation.

evidence_sources.description: Source evidence directly supporting produced facts.

frontend_version.description: Grammar, compiler, or frontend version label.

input_sources.description: Source inputs consumed by the producer.

rule.description: Optional deterministic rule or resolver identifier.

tier.description: Analysis tier supplied by the producer.

RelationEndpoint.description: A typed endpoint for a normalized relation.

RelationPredicate.description: A closed common predicate for normalized relations.

oneOf.description: A symbol has a definition occurrence.
An occurrence or symbol refers to a target.
A site or callable invokes a callable.
A site may dispatch to a runtime target.
A file or module imports another target.
A module or package exports a symbol.
A type satisfies a protocol or constraint.
A type mixes in another type.
A callable or occurrence reads a value.
A callable or occurrence writes a value.
A callable throws an error type.
A callable handles an error type.
A target depends on another target.
A callable or service publishes to a topic.
A callable or service consumes from a topic.
A callable or service reads a database object.
A callable or service writes a database object.
A fact binds to a foreign declaration.
A callable invokes a foreign declaration.
Generated content originates from another fact.
A fact changed in a source-control change.
A fact was renamed from another fact.
A fact was moved from another fact.
A fact was split from another fact.
A fact was merged from another fact.
Two facts co-changed within a bounded history window.
A fact belongs to a derived architecture view.

RelationRecord.description: One typed relation owned by the document repository and generation.

evidence.description: Source or derivation evidence for the relation fact.
Source or derivation evidence for the skipped-region fact.

SkippedRegionReason.description: A closed reason for a skipped source region.

oneOf.description: A configured byte or node bound was reached.
Source could not be parsed completely.
The adapter failed without invalidating other facts.

SourceMappingKind.description: The semantic direction of a generated or expanded source mapping.

oneOf.description: Generated source maps to its handwritten origin.
Expanded source maps to its invocation.
An invocation maps to its original declaration or schema.

evidence.description: Source or derivation evidence for the mapping fact.

SourceRef.description: A generation-bound reference to immutable repository source.

SourceSpan.description: A validated half-open source byte span within one file.
